name: Carrots Divine
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Dark brown sugar or substitute
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Boil carrots until soft enough to mash. Drain and mash.
3. Add lemon juice to mashed carrots.
4. In a separate bowl, cream together margarine (or butter), Crisco, brown sugar, and egg substitute.
5. Stir in baking powder and baking soda.
6. Mix in the mashed carrots until well combined.
7. Pour batter into a greased 2-quart mold or an 8 x 4-inch loaf pan.
8. Bake for 50-60 minutes.
9. Unmold and serve when warm. Can be frozen and reheated in foil.
10. Serves 6.
Food Exchange per serving: 1 vegetable exchange + 1 starch/bread exchange + 1 fat exchange?
